creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
../xsec/enc/OpenSSL/OpenSSLCryptoHashHMAC.hpp:178:13: error: field has incomplete type 'HMAC_CTX' (aka 'hmac_ctx_st')

During BSDCan 2018 the intention to update OpenSSL in base to 1.1.x branch was documented.

Intention is to update 12-STABLE to current 1.1.0 and subsequently update it to 1.1.1 when that is released. 

Poudriere log: https://keg.brnrd.eu/data/111amd64-default-openssl110/2018-06-11_10h42m37s/logs/errors/apache-xml-security-c-1.7.3_1.log
